content.text:
## Task: Delete FileSystemModelsTests.cs (tautological record-shape tests)
## Step: review

Delete the file `TestProject.Tests/Models/FileSystemModelsTests.cs` in its entirety. It contains 28 tests that verify compiler-guaranteed C# record features (constructor positional property assignment, sealed status, value equality, namespace, property types) for FileEntryDto, BrowseResultDto, SearchResultDto, MoveRequest, and CopyRequest. All of these are guaranteed by the C# record feature and would only fail if the code did not compile. The DTOs are exercised behaviorally through FileServiceTests and FilesControllerTests. Do not modify any other file. Verification: `dotnet build TestProject.sln` succeeds; `dotnet test TestProject.Tests/TestProject.Tests.csproj` passes.

## Response Format (required)
Respond with ONLY a single valid JSON object matching the schema below.
- No prose, explanations, or commentary before or after the JSON.
- No markdown code fences (```), no headings — output the raw JSON object.
- Do NOT call any tools and do NOT end your turn on a thinking block. Emit the JSON object directly as text.

JSON schema:
{ approved: Whether the implementation is accepted, feedback: Detailed review feedback, issues: Array<{ file: File with the issue, description: What needs to be fixed, severity: "critical" | "minor" /* How important the fix is */ }> }
